items.title: Opening Inventory Crashes the Game
items.summary: Public issue https://github.com/mezz/JustEnoughItems/issues/4357. With NeoForge 21.1.235 and JEI 19.32.0.358 or later, loading a world and opening inventory crashes the game; 19.27.0.346 is reported unaffected.
items.stackSummary: Crash report linked by the public issue.
items.symptom: Game crashes when inventory is opened.

items.title: Dragging an inventory item into Guide Builder crashes the client
items.summary: Public issue https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Dota2-Gameplay/issues/33416. In an online match, dragging Tango from inventory into the Guide Builder and adding another item to the resulting empty slot crashes Dota 2 to desktop.
items.symptom: Client crashes to desktop while editing an item guide.

items.title: Placing IC Gate from inventory triggers NullPointerException
items.summary: Public issue https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/GT-New-Horizons-Modpack/issues/25817. On pack 2.8.4 in single player, taking an IC gate from creative inventory and placing it causes a NullPointerException and disconnects the player from the world.
items.stackSummary: EncoderException caused by java.lang.NullPointerException during network handshake.
items.symptom: Fatal error disconnects the player after placing an IC gate.
items.actualResult: Player is forced out of the world with NullPointerException.

items.title: Creative inventory search crashes to main menu
items.summary: Public issue https://github.com/Creators-of-Aeronautics/Simulated-Project/issues/938. Typing any character into the creative inventory search bar crashes the game back to the main menu.
items.stackSummary: External crash report is linked by the public issue.
items.symptom: Game crashes to main menu during inventory search.
items.actualResult: Game exits to the main menu.

items.title: Inventory crashes after tooltips load as Unknown
items.summary: Public issue https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/GT-New-Horizons-Modpack/issues/25779. On pack 2.9.0-beta-2, all tooltips display Unknown after loading; opening inventory then crashes shortly afterward in both multiplayer and single player.
items.stackSummary: Issue links a crash report involving inventory and tooltip mods.
items.symptom: Inventory crashes after all game tooltips become Unknown.
items.actualResult: Internal server shuts down and shows a crash screen.
